subtopics.title: Components
subtopics.content:
- **60 cards** in 5 expedition colors (Yellow, Blue, White, Green, Red):
  - Each color: numbered 2-10 (9 cards) + 3 investment/wager cards
- **1** game board (optional — marks discard areas for each color)

subtopics.title: Table Setup
subtopics.content:
1. **Place board** (or designate 5 discard areas, one per color) between players.
2. **Shuffle all 60 cards.**
3. **Deal 8 cards** to each player.
4. **Remaining cards** form the draw pile.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
- **8 cards in hand.**
- **Expedition area** in front of you for each color (empty at start).
- **Keep hand hidden.**

subtopics.title: Game Overview
subtopics.content: Lost Cities is a 2-player card game of exploration. Start expeditions by playing numbered cards in ascending order. Each expedition you start costs 20 points, so only begin expeditions you can make profitable.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
On your turn:
1. **Play or discard** — Either play a card to one of your expeditions, or discard a card to its color's discard pile.
2. **Draw** — Draw 1 card from the draw pile or from the top of any color's discard pile.

subtopics.title: Key Actions
subtopics.content:
#### Playing Cards
- Play a card on your expedition of that color.
- Cards must be played in **ascending order** (but don't need to be consecutive).
- **Investment cards** must be played before any numbered cards in that color.
- Once played, cards cannot be rearranged.

#### Investment Cards
- Multiply the expedition's final score: 1 wager = ×2, 2 wagers = ×3, 3 wagers = ×4.
- Must be played before numbered cards.
- They multiply both profits AND losses.

#### Discarding
- Place a card on its color's discard pile.
- Your opponent may pick it up on their turn.

subtopics.title: Special Rules
subtopics.content:
- **Expedition cost** — Every started expedition begins at -20 points.
- **Cannot discard and pick up same color** — You can't discard and then draw from the same pile.
- **No obligation** — You don't have to start an expedition in a color.
- **8-card bonus** — If an expedition has 8 or more cards, add 20 bonus points.

subtopics.title: Scoring and Endgame
subtopics.content:
#### Game End
- When the draw pile is empty, the round ends immediately.

#### Scoring per Expedition
1. Sum all numbered cards in the expedition.
2. Subtract 20 (the expedition cost).
3. Multiply by investment multiplier (1 + number of wager cards).
4. Add 20 bonus if 8+ cards.

#### Example
- Cards: 2 wagers + 3, 5, 7, 8, 10 = 33 − 20 = 13 × 3 = 39 points.

#### Game
- Play 3 rounds. Highest total across all rounds wins.

subtopics.title: Beginner Tips
subtopics.content:
- **Don't start too many** — Each expedition costs 20; unprofitable ones are brutal.
- **Wager wisely** — Investment cards amplify risk. Only wager on expeditions with many cards.
- **Hold low cards** — Keep low numbers for flexibility but play them before they're stranded.
- **Watch discards** — Don't discard cards your opponent needs.

subtopics.title: Key Strategies
subtopics.content:
- **Break-even is 20** — You need number cards totaling 20+ to profit from an expedition.
- **Wager threshold** — Only use wagers if you expect 30+ in card values.
- **Deny picks** — Discard into colors your opponent hasn't started.
- **Timing** — Start expeditions early enough to play ascending cards.
- **8-card bonus** — The 20-point bonus for 8+ cards is very powerful with wagers.
